name: Australian Alliance for Animals
summary: National animal protection charity working to shift policy, law and institutions for animals.
description: Useful for national reform strategy, political engagement, welfare standards and cross-sector campaign alignment.
alignment: Listed because its national policy and law-reform work overlaps with Bite Back campaign pathways.
